race.comment: FIGHTING MAGNUS (10) jumped in grade and trip when demolishing his rivals with a comfortable 6-length victory over 2000m at Taree. Looks to map well for this with Christian Reith retaining the ride. Hard to hold out. COMMANDING ARTIST (3) is improving with racing and steps out to this trip for the first time. Closed strongly with the 61kg when a tenacious second over 1500m at Hawkesbury. Was a month between runs last start and sure to be thereabouts. COSMIC LAD (2) should relish this track and the extra trip fourth-up. Surged late from back in the field with the 61.5kg for a solid fourth over 1600m at Kembla Grange. Leading prospect. OAKFIELD MAMSELLE (6) goes well at this course and distance. Had excuses when slow into stride and never in contention with a poor twelfth over 1800m at Hawkesbury. Since fitted with a 1000m tick over trial. Each-way.
